content:
The user just said "hi". The pipeline state is EMPTY, which means no PDF has been uploaded yet. I should welcome them and ask them to upload their PDF document so we can start building their report.
Hello! I'm NeuraReport, your report-building assistant. I can help you convert PDF documents into automated database-driven reports.

To get started, please upload your PDF document. Once you do, I'll:
1. Extract the structure from your PDF
2. Connect it to your database
3. Build a template that can generate reports automatically

What PDF would you like to work with?
